//readmodel: The read model is fed purely from the bus: each MeterReadingReceived updates the latest reading and rolling baseline per meter, and a detected spike is pushed onto a bounded, newest-first feed. No consumer touches the Edge Gateway or a meter directly.

api.//tenant: The tenant is resolved by the gateway from the 'X-FactoryOS-Tenant' header (preferred) or the 'tenant' query fallback; a request with no resolvable tenant is rejected with 400.
api.meters: GET /m/energy/meters   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  ->  { tenant, meters: [ { meterId, metric, value, baseline, deltaPercent, unit, readingAt }, ... ] }
api.spikes: GET /m/energy/spikes?max=50   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  ->  { tenant, spikes: [ { meterId, metric, value, baseline, deltaPercent, unit, readingAt }, ... ] } (newest first)
